title: Valisvara Temple
tagline: Valisvara Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Valisvara Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Thiruvalisvaram in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, South India, India.
overview.description: Valisvara Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Thiruvalisvaram in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, South India, India. The temple is dedicated to Lord Shiva. The temple was constructed in the early part of the 10th century AD by Raja Raja Chola I the great Chola King.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Brahmadesam (Ambasamudram)
topPlaces.description: Brahmadesam is a village in Ambasamudram Taluk of Thirunelveli District in Tamil Nadu (India). This village was the Taluk Headquarters till 1850 or so, now only a small village.

topPlaces.name: Adaichani
topPlaces.description: Adaichani is a village panchayat situated in the Tirunelveli locale of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is surrounded by Pallakkal Pothukudi, Edaikal, and Papakudi.

topPlaces.name: Pallakkal Pudukkudi
topPlaces.description: Pallakkal Pothukudi is a village under Pappakudi panchayat union in Ambasamudram taluk of Tirunelveli district.

topPlaces.name: Ambasamudram
topPlaces.description: Ambasamudram is the principal town of the Ambasamudram taluk in Tirunelveli district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The entire taluk had a population of 392,226 as of 2001, with 42.5% classified as rural.

topPlaces.name: Ambasamudram taluk
topPlaces.description: The Ambasamudram taluk is in the Tirunelveli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the town of Ambasamudram.

topPlaces.name: Papanasanathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Papanasanathar Temple in Papanasam, a village in Tirunelveli district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to Hindu god Shiva. It is located 60 km from Tirunelveli.

topPlaces.name: Kovankulam
topPlaces.description: Kovankulam is a hamlet in the district of Tirunelveli near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India. The spoken language in this area is Tamil.This village is located on Ambur-Papanasam Road.

topPlaces.name: Kizha Ambur
topPlaces.description: Kizha Ambur also known as Keela Ambur is an ancient village situated close to the Western Ghats in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. The ancient name of this village is Snehapuri.

items.note: Brahmadesam is a village in Ambasamudram Taluk of Thirunelveli District in Tamil Nadu (India). This village was the Taluk Headquarters till 1850 or so, now only a small village.
Adaichani is a village panchayat situated in the Tirunelveli locale of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is surrounded by Pallakkal Pothukudi, Edaikal, and Papakudi.
Pallakkal Pothukudi is a village under Pappakudi panchayat union in Ambasamudram taluk of Tirunelveli district.

Ambasamudram is the principal town of the Ambasamudram taluk in Tirunelveli district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The entire taluk had a population of 392,226 as of 2001, with 42.5% classified as rural.
The Ambasamudram taluk is in the Tirunelveli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the town of Ambasamudram.

Kovankulam is a hamlet in the district of Tirunelveli near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India. The spoken language in this area is Tamil.This village is located on Ambur-Papanasam Road.
Kizha Ambur also known as Keela Ambur is an ancient village situated close to the Western Ghats in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. The ancient name of this village is Snehapuri.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Valisvara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Valisvara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Valisvara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (64 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Valisvara Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Valisvara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Valisvara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Valisvara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Valisvara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Brahmadesam (Ambasamudram), Adaichani, Pallakkal Pudukkudi, Ambasamudram, Ambasamudram taluk.
